app.description: GitLab CI/CD CLI - monitor your pipelines from the terminal.

init.short_help: Configure connection to a GitLab instance.
init.help:
Configure connection to a GitLab instance.

Interactively prompts for the GitLab URL and a Personal Access Token,
validates the connection, and saves credentials securely.

Example:
  cicd init

add.help:
Add a repository to the tracked list.

The REPO argument should be in 'group/project' format matching
the GitLab project path.

Examples:
  cicd add mygroup/myproject
  cicd add frontend/webapp

remove.short_help: Remove a repository from tracked list.
remove.help:
Remove a repository from the tracked list.

Examples:
  cicd remove mygroup/myproject

list.help:
Display all currently tracked repositories.

Example:
  cicd list
list.title: Tracked Repositories
list.empty: No tracked repositories. Add one with: cicd add group/project

status.help:
Show the status of the latest pipeline for tracked repositories.

If REPO is specified, shows status only for that repository.
Otherwise, shows status for all tracked repositories.

Examples:
  cicd status
  cicd status mygroup/myproject
status.empty: No tracked repositories. Add one with: cicd add

pipelines.short_help: Show recent pipelines for a repo.
pipelines.help:
Display recent pipelines for a given repository.

Examples:
  cicd pipelines mygroup/myproject
  cicd pipelines mygroup/myproject -n 20
pipelines.title: Pipelines - {repo}

jobs.help:
Display jobs for a specific pipeline or the latest one.

If PIPELINE_ID is omitted, jobs from the latest pipeline are shown.
Use -n/--count to show jobs from the last N pipelines.

Examples:
  cicd jobs mygroup/myproject
  cicd jobs mygroup/myproject 4409
  cicd jobs mygroup/myproject -n 5
jobs.title: Jobs - {repo} / Pipeline #{pipeline_id}
jobs.count_help: Show jobs from last N pipelines

logs.help:
Display logs for a specific job.

Use --tail/-t to show only the last N lines.

Examples:
  cicd logs mygroup/myproject 11765
  cicd logs mygroup/myproject 11765 --tail 50

images.help:
Display images in the Container Registry of a repository.

Examples:
  cicd images mygroup/myproject
images.empty: No images found in registry for {repo}

mrs.help:
Display merge requests for a repository.

Filter by state: opened, merged, closed, or all.

Examples:
  cicd mrs mygroup/myproject
  cicd mrs mygroup/myproject --state merged
mrs.title: Merge Requests - {repo} ({state})

envs.help:
Display environments (deployments) for a repository.

Examples:
  cicd envs mygroup/myproject
envs.title: Environments - {repo}

language.help:
Set the display language for CLI messages.

Available languages: en, pl, de, fr, es, nl, cs

Examples:
  cicd language pl
  cicd language en

error.not_initialized: GitLab connection not configured. Run first: cicd init
